execute.stdout:
hi -> short
hello -> medium
goodmorning -> long
ok -> short

code:
import io
import string
import list

let content = io.read_to_end()
let lines = string.split(content, "\n")
mut i = 0
let n = lines.len()
while i < n
  match lines.get(i)
  when Some(line)
    let len = string.len(line)
    if len == 0
      print("")
    else if len <= 3
      println("#{line} -> short")
    else if len <= 7
      println("#{line} -> medium")
    else
      println("#{line} -> long")
    end
  when None
    print("")
  end
  i = i + 1
end
